samsaraVehicleFields: The Fleet Vehicles API exposes fields such as name, VIN, make, model, year, license plate, and (when supported) engine serial number (ESN). Availability depends on Samsara account and hardware. This app mirrors those fields on the Maintenance → Selected Asset panel when present.
about: Starter reference for fleet maintenance. OEM parts catalogs, torque specs, and exact fitment are VIN- and build-specific — verify with the manufacturer, dealer parts lookup, or MOTOR/TruckSeries-style databases before ordering.

multiPositionCategories.label: Tires
multiPositionCategories.notes: Use wheel-end map; dual positions match common tractor/trailer layouts.

multiPositionCategories.label: Batteries
multiPositionCategories.notes: Class 8 tractors often use 2–4 batteries; locations vary by OEM (box, step, frame).

multiPositionCategories.label: Air springs / air bags
multiPositionCategories.notes: Suspension and lift axle air springs — corner or axle-end positions.

multiPositionCategories.label: Brakes
multiPositionCategories.notes: Foundation brakes by axle end — confirm drum vs disc per wheel.

multiPositionCategories.label: Filters
multiPositionCategories.notes: Engine air, fuel stages, coolant, transmission, power steering, cabin.

multiPositionCategories.label: Lighting
multiPositionCategories.notes: Exterior lamps — replace in pairs when recommended.

multiPositionCategories.label: Other multi-location
multiPositionCategories.notes: Describe location in the expense line or notes when no map applies.

externalCatalogHints.name: OEM dealer parts
externalCatalogHints.detail: VIN-based lookup for your make (e.g. Freightliner, Peterbilt, Volvo, Kenworth).

externalCatalogHints.name: Aftermarket
externalCatalogHints.detail: Bendix air brake, Meritor driveline, common filter cross-references — match thread and pressure ratings.

externalCatalogHints.name: Tire sizing
externalCatalogHints.detail: Load index, speed rating, ply / load range must match fleet policy and axle ratings.
